title: PageGuidance Component Contract
description: Props interface for the PageGuidance wrapper component that renders page title, description, and instructions

description.description: Brief description of what the page is for. Parent pages: professional tone. Child pages: fun tone.
examples: This is your personal list of books you're reading or want to read.
Here's your reading list! 📚 Keep track of books you've read and want to read soon.

instructions.description: How to use this page. Clear, actionable, step-by-step or task-oriented.
examples: Click 'Add Book' to search for a new book. Click on any book to update your progress.
Enter your email and password. If you don't have an account, click 'Sign Up'.

tone.description: Audience tone. 'parent' for professional/adult audience; 'child' for 7-12 year old audience.

icon.description: Optional: Lucide React icon name (e.g., 'BookOpen', 'Gift', 'Settings'). Only for child pages to add visual interest.

examples.title: Your Reading List
examples.description: This is your personal list of books you're reading or want to read.
examples.instructions: Click 'Add Book' to search for a new book, or click on any book to log your progress.

examples.title: Your Dashboard
examples.description: Here's a snapshot of each child's reading progress, rewards earned, and milestones reached.
examples.instructions: Click on any child's card to view detailed progress, or use the menu to manage accounts.
